---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
subtitle: "Xingjian Zhou · Geometric Analysis"
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.cv-actions}
[Download CV (PDF)](files/XingjianZhouCV.pdf){.btn .btn-primary download="XingjianZhouCV.pdf"}

[Email](mailto:zhouxingjian@stu.xmu.edu.cn){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0004-9761-5438){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=hSVmSnAAAAAJ&hl=en){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

[GitHub](https://github.com/XingjianZhouMath){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

## Education

::: {.cv-timeline}
::: {.cv-entry}
### Joint Ph.D. · University of Trento

**Trento, Italy · 2024-present**<br>
Hosts: Prof. Virginia Agostiniani and Prof. Lorenzo Mazzieri
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
### Ph.D. in Mathematics · Xiamen University

**Xiamen, China · 2022-present**<br>
Advisor: Prof. Chao Xia
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
### M.S. in Mathematics · Xiamen University

**Xiamen, China · 2020-2022**<br>
Advisor: Prof. Chao Xia
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
### B.S. in Mathematics · Southeast University

**Nanjing, China · 2016-2020**
:::
:::

## Research Interests

My research lies in **geometric analysis**, focusing on monotonicity formulas and geometric inequalities associated with elliptic equations arising in differential geometry. Current interests include scalar curvature problems, rigidity phenomena, and analytic aspects of the Penrose inequality.

**Keywords:** Potential theory; nonlinear elliptic and parabolic PDEs; inverse mean curvature flow; minimal surfaces; scalar curvature.

## Publications and Preprints

1. Chao Xia, Jiabin Yin, **Xingjian Zhou**. "New monotonicity for *p*-capacitary functions in 3-manifolds with nonnegative scalar curvature." *Advances in Mathematics* **440** (2024), 109526. [Journal](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.aim.2024.109526)

2. Jiabin Yin, **Xingjian Zhou**. "Sharp upper bounds of *p*-capacity in convex cone and asymptotically flat half-space." *Letters in Mathematical Physics* **116** (2026), Article 34. [Journal](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11005-026-02062-y)

3. Jiabin Yin, **Xingjian Zhou**. "General monotone formula for homogeneous *k*-Hessian equation in the exterior domain and its applications." *arXiv:2506.01434* (2025). [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.01434)

4. Chao Xia, Jiabin Yin, **Xingjian Zhou**. "Mass-*p*-Capacity Inequalities in Asymptotically Flat Half-Spaces." *arXiv:2605.31202* (2026). [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31202)

## Award

**National Scholarship of China**, 2025.

## Selected Talks and Posters

- Invited talk, Guangzhou Young Geometric Analysis Workshop, Guangzhou, China (2023).
- Invited talk, Southeast University, Nanjing, China (2024).
- Poster presentation, Topics in Geometric Analysis, Pisa, Italy (2025).
- Invited talk, Scuola Normale Superiore, Pisa, Italy (2025).
- Poster presentation, PRIN School on Geometry and Gravity, SISSA, Trieste, Italy (2025).
- Invited talk, Second Tianyuan Southeast Geometry Forum, Xiamen University, China (2026).
- Invited talk, University of Freiburg, Freiburg, Germany (2026).

## Teaching Experience

**Teaching Assistant**

- Differential Geometry (Spring 2021)
- Differential Manifolds (Fall 2021; Fall 2022)
- Riemannian Geometry (Spring 2024)
